title: Input schema of the Product Documentation Change Monitor

startUrls.title: Documentation URLs to Monitor
startUrls.description: URLs of documentation sites to monitor for changes.

monitoredProducts.title: Monitored Products/Libraries
monitoredProducts.description: Product names and versions to track (e.g., React 18.0, Node.js 20).

checkInterval.title: Check Interval (hours)
checkInterval.description: How often to check for updates (recommend 6-24 hours).

detectNewPages.title: Detect New Pages
detectNewPages.description: Alert when new documentation pages are added.

detectRemovedPages.title: Detect Removed Pages
detectRemovedPages.description: Alert when documentation pages are removed.

detectAPIChanges.title: Detect API Changes
detectAPIChanges.description: Identify added/removed/modified API methods and parameters.

extractCodeExamples.title: Extract Code Examples
extractCodeExamples.description: Track changes to code samples and examples.

trackVersions.title: Track Multiple Versions
trackVersions.description: Monitor different version branches (e.g., v1, v2, v3).

extractReleaseNotes.title: Extract Release Notes
extractReleaseNotes.description: Capture official release notes and changelogs.

compareWithPrevious.title: Compare With Previous Version
compareWithPrevious.description: Generate diffs between current and previous scans.

notificationLevel.title: Notification Level
notificationLevel.description: Alert on all changes or only major ones.

generateSummary.title: Generate AI Summary
generateSummary.description: Create AI-generated summaries of major changes.

maxPagesToScan.title: Max Pages to Scan
maxPagesToScan.description: Maximum number of documentation pages to process.
